caption: A man with brown hair and a beard is seated in front of a jungle-themed backdrop featuring lush greenery, mountains, and a waterfall. He is wearing a red, blue, and green plaid button-down shirt. To his right, large stylized orange text reads "JUMANJI," with the smaller text "WELCOME TO THE JUNGLE" appearing directly underneath. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, facing slightly toward the left side of the frame. His expression shifts subtly as he speaks; initially, his mouth is closed and his gaze is steady, but by the final frame, his eyes are partially closed and his mouth is open, capturing a moment of active speech. The background and the on-screen logos remain static as the man's facial expressions change.
